title: so we humans are the 18th Angel
display_title: so we humans are the 18th Angel
wikitext:
[]: so we humans are the 18th Angel?             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:09 pm The humans are made form the LCL(actually, Lilith's own blood)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:12 pm Yes, we're the 18th Angel, as stated in End of Evangelion. What does this have to do with Rebuild, and what is this thread actually about?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:14 pm Has a single thread this guy started been in the right subforum? I think this is even worse than me when I started. And that's pretty bad.

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:17 pm Reichu wrote: Yes, we're the 18th Angel, as stated in End of Evangelion. What does this have to do with Rebuild, and what is this thread actually about?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:21 pm eva unit05 wrote: this thread is actually about the humans being the 18th Angel and are the things in the Trailer are humans?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jan 10, 2009 8:54 pm If anything wouldn't humanity be the 13th Angel? I though after Ramiel there's only 7 Angels left (8 if you include the mystery 3rd Angel...which could be Eva 06)

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Jan 10, 2009 11:14 pm it kinda would make sense for us to be the third, we were the third to appear on earth. even in the original we should have been the third

[]:             Quote Post by Deathmask » Sat Jan 10, 2009 11:31 pm What is this thread even for?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 10, 2009 11:39 pm Axell wrote: it kinda would make sense for us to be the third, we were the third to appear on earth. even in the original we should have been the third

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 11, 2009 12:38 am Axell wrote: it kinda would make sense for us to be the third, we were the third to appear on earth. even in the original we should have been the third

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 11, 2009 12:45 am Sachi: The problem stems from there not being a consistent usage of the word "Angels". It's possible to deduce the more generalized version of it to effectively refer to "all humans but the first", although that still leaves the issue of why some Angels get to be in the "list" and some don't. Perhaps "Eva" is really the 19th entry and we've never been told...

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Jan 11, 2009 1:11 am Am I the only one who thinks that instead of getting all hung up with the "order" of the Angels (since they were numbered based on NERV's discovery of them and not which ones were actually born first), we should just take away the statement that all of them are "human" AND "Angel", and the same goddamned race aside from our shapes?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 11, 2009 1:56 am AuraTwilight wrote: since they were numbered based on NERV's discovery of them and not which ones were actually born first

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Jan 11, 2009 2:11 pm A) They found Adam first. They found Lilith second. Then Sachiel showed up Third. Easy. B) Did Misato actually read "18th Angel" or was that her own conclusion after reading the data? If the former, perhaps the document something said to the effect of "These are the 17 Angels. They have these properties and blah blah blah they're like us. Are we the 18th Angel?" in the sense of someone could add, like, "18. Metatron" and bump Humanity up to 19th.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Sun Jan 11, 2009 3:25 pm AuraTwilight wrote: B) Did Misato actually read "18th Angel" or was that her own conclusion after reading the data? If the former, perhaps the document something said to the effect of "These are the 17 Angels. They have these properties and blah blah blah they're like us. Are we the 18th Angel?" in the sense of someone could add, like, "18. Metatron" and bump Humanity up to 19th.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jan 12, 2009 2:12 am Eric Blair wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: B) Did Misato actually read "18th Angel" or was that her own conclusion after reading the data? If the former, perhaps the document something said to the effect of "These are the 17 Angels. They have these properties and blah blah blah they're like us. Are we the 18th Angel?" in the sense of someone could add, like, "18. Metatron" and bump Humanity up to 19th.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Mon Jan 12, 2009 2:30 am EoE stream: Link Removed EoE Script: http://www.google.com/search?q=end+of+evangelion+script&ie=utf-8&oe=utf-8&aq=t&rls=org.mozilla:en-US:official&client=firefox-a Now there... it wasn't so hard was it? Try having facts and figures next time before answering a question with another question or dropping the ball and justifying it by saying: AuraTwilight wrote: Well effing excuse me. I don't have my copy right now, and I'm not going to watch it illegally any time soon.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Jan 12, 2009 2:45 am How is thread still going?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 12, 2009 11:32 am I dunno but it doesn't belong in Rebuild. Moved. AuraTwlight: A less attitude in your posts please.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Jan 12, 2009 2:56 pm Angels appear to be SoLs and their progeny. Angels do not appear to include a third generation, such as "articifical 'god' creations made by the progeny of SoL". In other words, Angels are an SoL and the life it produces. I don't particularly like that definition, but that's what seems to apply. It appears that Angel numbering might be included in DSS (it's possible the actual numbering is not, but Seele seems to talk about the order of the Angels as being listed, and in context maybe even the numbering itself). Since Tabris is talked about as if its the last Angel in the DSS, then the next available (unlisted) number is applied to the last Angel (the last entity that fits the description of "Angel"). IIRC, Humans are somehow a single, fragmented entity compared to "complete in themselves" entities like Angels (or maybe I dreamed that after a NGE marathon). The numbering may also just be related to "who takes center stage next," as opposed to order of creation, order of importance, etc. We don't get any context in the series that I recall: "The Seventh Angel [to be discovered? That we see? That tries to kill us? That's up to bat?"]. Humans are the progeny of an SoL (like the majority of the "Angels" that come to "meet Adam" or whatever the heck it is that they're on about), and can be seen as an Angel - an heir to Earth.
